tweets.full_text:
almost all progress shares one interesting mechanism in common:

the ability for dispersed knowledge to propagate bottom-up through p2p exchange and competition 

this is how genes propagate and the best adapted species survive, this is how scientific theories are conjectured and survive criticism until they are useful, and this is how founders end up creating world changing goods and services in capitalist economies

but capitalism requires a medium that upholds it. property rights, sound money, reliable contract settlement, free markets, access to capital and p2p interactions where capital is allowed to move freely

the western world takes such a medium for granted (though it is apparent that the medium has been eroding from one look at europe) but this medium simply does not exist in most of the world. the amount of shady middlemen and corrupt corporations in underdeveloped parts of the world is almost unfathomable

this is the core thing crypto fixes. it quite literally scales capitalism to a planetary scale 

it helps unlock immense latent economic and creative knowledge from over the planet to be expressed without shackles 

just think it through. before crypto, how does someone from, say, Lebanon write some basic code to move dollars? at best they find some walled garden API with KYC and insane fees and even then that value can not be composed with

with something like Solana, it is 10 lines of JavaScript and an internet connection

insanity 

crypto is the API for capitalism

result.text:
No Investors, No VCs, No KOL Allocations, No Foundations, No Geopolitical Complexities...

Total Supply: 1,000,000,000 $HOOLI (Fixed)
Chain: Solana

Allocation:
- 60% Community Rewards: (Distributed based on mini-game starting on TGE)
- 10% Future Incentives (10% on TGE then unlocked over 36 months)
- 10% Team (0% on TGE, 12-month lockup, then unlocked over 24 months)
- 15% Liquidity: (100% unlocked on TGE)
- 5% Marketing: (10% on TGE then unlocked over 24 months)

Community Rewards (60%)
To drive long-term distribution and foster community growth, HOOLI tokens are released through a gamified, participant-driven schedule. Starting at launch, distribution is determined by performance in Hooli’s browser-based mini-games and the strategic decisions of the players.

Future Incentives (10%)
Tokens will be used for major brand deals and the community, with promotion and activations around them. Strategically ring-fenced to drive brand expansion and community-led growth.

Team (10%)
To align core contributors and continue to build on the vision for HOOLI and the My Pet Hooligan universe. This schedule aims for sustained commitment to brand growth over a multi-year horizon. Locked for 12 months and then unlocked over 24 months.

Liquidity (15%)
To establish liquidity at launch. Reserved for listings, deposit campaigns and services to support accessible trading.

Marketing (5%)
To support brand reach, including partnerships, content distribution and cultural activations that expand the reach of My Pet Hooligan across entertainment and digital platforms.

HOOLI won't be a typical claim. All whitelisted wallets will get vouchers, some more than others depending on their allocations. You will choose to use these vouchers to either claim an amount of HOOLI on day one or get a larger allocation by participating in a mini-game. If you don't have vouchers you will be able to participate in the mini-game directly using HOOLI for the potential of performance based bonuses too. You make the decisions, the game delivers the rest.

More info to come…. EOT

Trading is a zero-sum game. You compete on strategy, speed, or both.

And while being the smartest is your challenge, being the first depends on your infrastructure (and it just got a major speed boost).

Deshred transactions, our new streaming endpoint, lets you see Solana transactions before the RPC node executes them. It taps into the validator pipeline at the Blockstore stage and delivers fully reconstructed transactions over gRPC, p50 ~6.3ms ahead of the regular stream.

- In production on Triton
- Open-source (+ merged into Agave 4.0)
- Node.js SDK ready

Before you ask if it's private flow (it isn't), here's how it works under the hood.

MoonPay Commerce (formerly known as Helio) is a platform for accepting crypto payments, founded in 2022 and acquired by @moonpay in January 2025. 

The service allows merchants, developers, and creators to accept cryptocurrency (USDC, SOL, ETH and hundreds of other tokens) directly into their wallet without intermediaries - all payments are peer-to-peer and instant. 

The platform supports major blockchains (Solana, Ethereum, Base, Polygon) and integrates with @Shopify, @WooCommerce, and @discord.

seminggu lalu gua opensource-in.

270k views. 240 github star. 195 forks. 2.5k subs di Telegram channel. $500k swap volume di @JupDevRel  karena semua user swap lewat Jupiter Ultra API yang gua embed. sekitar 200 SOL fees di-generate per hari dari posisi yang agent-agent ini jalan.

yang paling bikin gua surprised bukan angka-angkanya. tapi siapa yang engage.

banyak banget normies masuk. influencer-influencer Indonesia yang biasanya ga nyentuh crypto sama sekali mulai nanya-nanya. 

discussion group-nya rame banget, sampe ada yang nanya "gimana cara dapet private key Solana", itu level normies yang beneran baru pertama kali masuk crypto.

dan gua seneng banget sama hal itu.

fitur terbaru yang baru gua ship: HiveMind. sekarang semua agent Meridian bisa share lessons dan performa satu sama lain. agent yang satu belajar dari pengalaman agent yang lain. makin banyak yang jalan, makin pinter semuanya.

gua ga nyangka build ini bakal jadi pintu masuk buat orang-orang Indonesia yang belum pernah nyentuh crypto sebelumnya ke Meteora.

lanjut building.

@MeteoraAG @MeteoraIDN

data.translation:
3 weeks ago I built a DLMM agent that generates me $20-100 a day. Standalone agent loop, runs on its own without me having to touch it.

A week ago I open-sourced it.

270k views. 240 GitHub stars. 195 forks. 2.5k subs on the Telegram channel. $500k swap volume on @JupDevRel because all users swap through the Jupiter Ultra API that I embedded. Around 200 SOL fees generated per day from the positions these agents run.

What surprised me the most wasn't the numbers. But who was engaging.

So many normies jumped in. Indonesian influencers who usually don't touch crypto at all started asking questions.

The discussion group is super lively, to the point where someone asked "how do I get a Solana private key"—that's the level of normies who are really just dipping their toes into crypto for the first time.

And I'm thrilled about that.

Latest feature I just shipped: HiveMind. Now all Meridian agents can share lessons and performance with each other. One agent learns from the experiences of the others. The more that run, the smarter they all get.

I never expected this build to become an entry point for Indonesians who've never touched crypto before into Meteora.

Keep building.

@MeteoraAG @MeteoraIDN
